diagnosis.differential_diagnosis: Bilateral Axillary Seroma, Not specified, Not specified, Not specified, Not specified, Not specified, Not specified, Not specified
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with pain and worsening erythema around her bilateral incision sites after vomiting, with brownish feculent drainage from her drains. The physical exam showed induration and erythema around the left mastectomy site, which, along with the clinical settings post-surgery, supported the diagnosis of cellulitis.
